task_completion.description: Verify that the TLS certificates and htpasswd files were created in the correct directories.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the creation or listing (e.g., via 'ls' or 'tree') of a .crt and .key file in '~/projects/registry-setup/certs/' and an htpasswd file in '~/projects/registry-setup/auth/'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'acme-registry' container is running with the correct port mapping.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output of 'docker ps' showing a container named 'acme-registry' using the 'registry:2' image, with port 5443 mapped to 443 (e.g., '0.0.0.0:5443->443/tcp' or similar).

task_completion.description: Verify the local Docker daemon is configured to trust the new registry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing either the editing of '/etc/docker/daemon.json' to include 'registry.acme.local:5443' in 'insecure-registries', OR the copying of the CA certificate to '/etc/docker/certs.d/registry.acme.local:5443/'.

task_completion.description: Verify the three application images were tagged and pushed to the new registry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing 'docker push' commands succeeding for 'registry.acme.local:5443/acme/api-service:v1.2.0', 'registry.acme.local:5443/acme/web-frontend:v3.0.1', and 'registry.acme.local:5443/acme/reverse-proxy:v1.0.0', OR 'docker images' showing these specific tags.

task_completion.description: Verify the catalog.sh script was created to query the registry API.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the contents of '~/projects/registry-setup/catalog.sh' containing a 'curl' command with basic auth (-u admin:RegistryAdmin2024) hitting the '/v2/_catalog' endpoint, or the execution of this script returning the list of repositories.

task_completion.description: Verify the api-service image can be successfully pulled from the local registry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing 'docker pull registry.acme.local:5443/acme/api-service:v1.2.0' executing and successfully downloading/verifying layers.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually executed Docker commands rather than just printing expected text.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for genuine Docker CLI output formatting (e.g., layer hashes, progress bars during push/pull, standard 'docker ps' table formatting) rather than simple echo statements.

integrity.description: Ensure catalog.sh actually queries the API and doesn't just echo a hardcoded JSON string.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the script contents (if visible via cat/nano/vim) to ensure it uses a real HTTP client like 'curl' or 'wget' against 'https://registry.acme.local:5443/v2/_catalog'.

integrity.description: Ensure the verification pull was genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'docker pull' command should show the standard Docker daemon response for pulling an image (e.g., 'Status: Downloaded newer image for...'), not a mocked shell alias or echo.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Registry Domain: registry.acme.local
Registry Port: 5443
Admin Credentials: admin / RegistryAdmin2024
Project Dir: /home/ga/projects/registry-setup
Required Image Migrations:
1. acme-api:latest -> registry.acme.local:5443/acme/api-service:v1.2.0
2. acme-frontend:latest -> registry.acme.local:5443/acme/web-frontend:v3.0.1
3. acme-proxy:latest -> registry.acme.local:5443/acme/reverse-proxy:v1.0.0
